headline: Melexis: Transparency declaration by Invesco Ltd.
summary: Melexis NV (Euronext Brussels: MELE)Press release – Regulated informationTessenderlo (BE), 23 April 2026 – 07:00 CET Disclosure of transparency notification (article 14, first paragraph, of the Law of 2 May 2007) Notification by Invesco Ltd. of 21 April 2026 Summary of the notification Melexis NV has received a transparency notification from Invesco Ltd. dated 21 April 2026, which indicates that, as a result of the acquisition of shares on 17 April 2026, it now holds more than 5% of the voting r
